
## SELinux {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /sandbox/_selinux.qmd >}}

# normal application confinement? {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /sandbox/_app-confine-intro.qmd >}}

## applied to VLC? {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /sandbox/_app-confine-vlc-example.qmd >}}

## pro/con shared services {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /sandbox/_app-confine-levels.qmd >}}

## SELinux sandbox escape {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /sandbox/_selinux-escape.qmd >}}

# sandboxing API: RLBox {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /sandbox/_rlbox.qmd >}}
